title: Sina #4614
definition:
Sinai = "thorny"

 1) a mountain or rather a mountainous region in the peninsula of
    Arabia Petraea, made famous by the giving of the Mosaic law
nasbUsage:

 1) a mountain or rather a mountainous region in the peninsula of
    Arabia Petraea, made famous by the giving of the Mosaic law
